data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a full audit trail for permission changes, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates such an audit trail exists. The linked use case specifies the need for a full audit trail, yet the prior steps do not include any records or logs of permission changes, which is critical to fulfilling this requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of an audit trail for permission changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
